'''Loce''' was a celestial body<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> situated in the [[Loce system/Legends|Loce system]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="TEA" /> that shared its name with the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[near-Human]] [[Locan]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the young Locan [[Talas Piran]].<ref name="AIR" /> At some point by [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes that [[Talas Piran]] became [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] at least four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to its setting, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Piran was captured by [[Slaver/Legends|enslavers]] and taken from Loce, eventually being sold to a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]–sanctioned company for which he was forced to [[Logger|log]] [[Tree/Legends|trees]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Hintivan II]]<ref name="AIR" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sectors]].<ref name="EAOC Hintivan">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Hintivan system/Legends|Hintivan system]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Loce was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Loce [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square S-4.<ref name="TEA" />
